tech_news.title: Xbox Game Pass quietly adds nine surprise games to its Essential tier - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: Without any prior announcement, Microsoft has added another batch of games to its Xbox Game Pass Essential tier, including Neon Abyss and Iron Brigade.

tech_news.title: Windows 11 is getting a macOS-like speed boost - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft has started testing a new speed boost feature for Windows 11. It dynamically adjusts CPU clocks to speed up menus, flyouts, apps, and more.

tech_news.title: Forza Horizon 6 has been leaked and cracked a week before its release - The Verge
tech_news.description: The source of the leak appears to be an unencrypted Steam preload.

tech_news.title: Logitech’s tiny folding mouse improves upon the laptop trackpad - The Verge
tech_news.description: Logitech is reportedly developing a new wireless mouse that folds in half to make it easier to carry around in a bag or pocket.

tech_news.title: Men Across the Country Are Artificially Inflating Their Penises. They’re Doing It for a Reason You’d Never Expect. - Slate
tech_news.description: “It isn’t going to look like your God-given penis, only larger. It’s going to look like you’ve had work done.”

tech_news.title: Steam Machine Buyers Will Face a Queue System For Its 4 Models, as Valve Moves to Prevent Scalper Markups Early - Wccftech
tech_news.description: Valve leaked code reveals a reservation queue and four models for the Steam Machine to stop scalpers and prevent another launch fiasco

tech_news.title: Xbox Game Pass adds new day-one game Outbound today - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: Fans of cozy Xbox games have a fresh title to enjoy via Game Pass today, as Outbound launches into service for Xbox Series X|S and PC.

tech_news.title: Crimson Desert Adds Surprise Claw Machine Mini-Game and Lets Pet Dogs Attack Enemies as Part of Update 1.06.00 - IGN
tech_news.description: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has released this week’s update as promised, and it adds what it said it would add. But it also adds a whole lot more, including a surprise claw machine mini-game that gives unique rewards.
